description: Two-player English/American checkers (draughts) on an 8x8 board with monochrome IBM-Plex-Mono aesthetic. Standard rules: diagonal moves, mandatory captures, multi-jump chains, king promotion on the back row. Click-to-select + click-to-move. localStorage save/restore.
qualityNotes: Hand-curated from mchatai.com/hub/checkers-mono/play (publisher GI1GHQ7w). Working diagonal-move + mandatory-capture logic, multi-jump chain support, king promotion. Monochrome IBM Plex Mono aesthetic — distinct from typical checkers boards. Preserve the board[][] 2D-array model and the legal-move-generation function.
